root_cause: Vatican Museums CVR fell −0.63pp (4.47%→3.84%) because peak spring demand (+13% traffic) exceeded fixed timed-entry slot supply — shrinking available booking dates by 5.1 per 30-day window — while a secondary checkout failure on iOS (C2A, consistent with confirmed +7.4% price increase on exp 7998) and Android (A2O, consistent with live inventory race condition) added a compounding −40% Shapley contribution. Re-evaluated 2026-05-05: original 25/35 was wrong on T4 and T5 (those gaps were already resolved in run2 report); revised to 29/35.
